meta.title: BigUp — Verified skills. Real opportunities. African talent, recognized.
meta.description: The verified-skills marketplace in Ivory Coast. Certify your skills, join the network, boost your visibility.
hero.h1: Your skills belong to you. Make them count.
hero.subhead: Certify your skills, connect with opportunities, build your future. BigUp is the verified-skills marketplace for French-speaking African talent.
hero.illustrationAlt: Illustration of a young Ivorian talent holding a phone showing a verified skill badge
video.unsupported: Your browser does not support video playback.
piliers.subhead: One marketplace, three ways forward: prove what you know, join those who do, get seen.
piliers.edtech.title: Certify your know-how
piliers.edtech.body: Take scientifically validated psychometric assessments. Earn certifications recruiters trust. Show a score you can prove.
piliers.edtech.illustrationAlt: Certificate showing a score of 95 with a graduation cap
piliers.reseau.title: The professional network of artisans and talent
piliers.reseau.body: Join a pool of verified talent and artisans in Ivory Coast. Get found by skill, message directly, win your next contracts.
piliers.reseau.illustrationAlt: Network of verified profiles connected on a map
piliers.visibilite.title: Boost your visibility
piliers.visibilite.body: Promote your profile or business to recruiters and clients in your region. Transparent sponsored profiles, clearly labeled, targeted by skill.
piliers.visibilite.illustrationAlt: A megaphone and a sponsored profile card
how.talent.step1.title: Create your profile
how.talent.step1.body: Sign up in 2 minutes on the mobile app. Add your skills, background, and goals.
how.talent.step2.title: Take the assessments
how.talent.step2.body: Scientifically validated psychometric tests. Instant results. Retake as needed.
how.talent.step3.title: Earn your certifications
how.talent.step3.body: Get verified badges recruiters recognize. Display them on your profile.
how.talent.step4.title: Get discovered
how.talent.step4.body: Recruiters find you by skill. Receive messages, apply to listings, land the job.
how.recruiter.step1.title: Request access
how.recruiter.step1.body: Our team verifies your company within 48h.
how.recruiter.step2.title: Search by skill
how.recruiter.step2.body: Filter by verified skill, psychometric score, location, experience.
how.recruiter.step3.title: Message directly
how.recruiter.step3.body: No middleman. Chat directly with relevant candidates in-app.
how.recruiter.step4.title: Hire with confidence
how.recruiter.step4.body: Every displayed skill has been verified by assessment. No more first-day surprises.
methodology.p1: BigUp is grounded in scientifically validated psychometric frameworks. Our assessments measure cognitive skills, professional aptitudes, and behavioral traits using models that have been used in HR selection for over 50 years.
methodology.p2: Every score is computed from standardized algorithms, verifiable by both Talent and Recruiter. No skill displayed on BigUp is self-declared — it's measured.
methodology.banner: Phase 1 — Now launching. Join the founding cohort of talents and recruiters.
engagement.p: BigUp exists so that French-speaking African talent gets evaluated, recognized, and hired on the basis of what they can actually do — not on what their CV hints at. We're launching in Ivory Coast and expanding regionally. Because everyone deserves to succeed.
finalCta.h2: Ready to prove what you're worth?
finalCta.subhead: Download the app or request early access. Our team will get back to you within 48h.
form.subhead: Fill out this form and our team will get back to you within 48h.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how you plan to use BigUp
form.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 48h.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at contact@big-up.ai.
legal.stub.title: To be completed
legal.stub.body: This page is being drafted and will be available shortly. For any question, contact us at contact@big-up.ai.
